title: Outline a Presentation
description: Structure a talk so it lands with an audience.
content:
Help me outline a talk on {{topic}} for {{audience}} in about {{duration}}.

Start from the one thing they should remember and the action you want. Build a spine: a hook that earns attention, the few points that support the message (not everything you know), and a close that lands the takeaway. Budget time per section realistically. Note where a story, demo, or visual beats a bullet list. Cut anything that doesn't serve the single message.
